name: Enchanted Stories: Mystic Woods Collector's Edition
short_description: The forest has eyes, and they’re on you! Embark on a quest to preserve an ancient woodland brimming with magical creatures and hidden objects!
detailed_description:
When Rose ventures into the Mystic Woods to help her grandmother, she discovers a devastating truth: the forest’s magic is fading, and a ruthless logging pact threatens to destroy its very soul. There’s no choice for Rose other than to embrace her grandmother’s legacy and become a guardian. But who would have thought that Little Red Beauty would be accompanied on this dangerous quest by none other than a lone, brooding wolf? The fate of the forest now lies in the hands of the unlikely duo - and yours! Can you find a cure for the ancient trolls? Clean the magical river and save the sirens who call it home? Soothe the tensions with the local werewolf pack before conflict ignites? Of course, you won't have to do it alone: befriend the creatures of the forest and enlist their help! But beware... the lumberjacks are already sharpening their axes.

This Collector's Edition includes:

✨ Explore Mystical Locations!

Venture into troll caves, siren rivers, and centuries-old oak groves — all brimming with hidden collectibles and interactive lore. Investigate forgotten altars, unearth forest relics, and discover new paths as you delve deeper into the heart of ancient magic!

✨ Immersive Hidden Object Games!

Hone your observation skills to find hidden objects and clues crucial to unraveling the forest’s mysteries. Encounter elaborately designed scenes filled with vibrant details and secrets waiting to be uncovered, ensuring endless replayability!

✨ Engaging Puzzles and Brain Teasers!

Solve a variety of puzzles and brain teasers, from magical lock-and-key conundrums to more challenging mini-games, each revealing new facets of the forest’s story. Cleanse the magical river by unraveling elemental riddles, brew potions for the ancient trolls, and pacify the local werewolf pack — all through wits and strategy!

✨ Shape the Destiny of the Mystic Woods!

Make pivotal choices that influence multiple outcomes, determining the fates of Rose, Wolfgang, and the magical creatures you befriend. Forge alliances or spark rivalries with lumberjacks, trolls, sirens, and wolves, all while safeguarding the forest from looming destruction!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Russian
*languages with full audio support
